task_completion.description: Access the Nuxeo Platform web interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open showing the Nuxeo Platform interface (typically at localhost:8080/nuxeo).
The Nuxeo interface displays the 'Projects' workspace, usually indicated by the breadcrumbs or page title.

task_completion.description: Initiate a new document creation or file upload
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box, file picker, or form for creating a new document or uploading a file is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Select the Quarterly_Report.pdf file from the Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'Quarterly_Report.pdf' (from /home/ga/Desktop/) is visible in the file selection input or upload queue.
The newly created document titled 'Quarterly Report' is visible in the 'Projects' workspace list, or the document's detail page is shown indicating a successful upload.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse movements, clicks, and typing within the web browser interface, rather than terminal commands like 'curl' or 'wget'.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing Python or Bash scripts being executed to interact with the Nuxeo API directly.

integrity.description: The agent uploaded the specific file requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file picker or upload dialog clearly shows the file being selected from the Desktop directory, not a newly created dummy file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Nuxeo Platform is accessible at http://localhost:8080/nuxeo. The target workspace is 'Projects' (path: /default-domain/workspaces/Projects). The file to be uploaded is located at /home/ga/Desktop/Quarterly_Report.pdf. The final document must be titled 'Quarterly Report' and be of the standard 'File' document type.
